note: ITIDs 0x16-0x29: Vehicle Tracking Data. All sub_fields are 4-byte (32-bit) unsigned. Recent data resets with Service $04 or when PSA reaches 50 hours. Lifetime data only resets on KAM loss/reprogram.
note_zh: ITIDs 0x16-0x29：车辆追踪数据。所有子字段为4字节（32位）无符号。近期数据在服务$04或PSA达到50小时时重置。终身数据仅在KAM丢失/重新编程时重置。

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - Engine Run/Idle Time
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 发动机运行/怠速时间
info_types.description: 32 bytes: 8 fields × 4 bytes each. Ignition counters (counts), engine run time and idle time (seconds).
info_types.description_zh: 32字节：8个字段×每个4字节。点火计数器（次数），发动机运行时间和怠速时间（秒）。

_sub_fields.label: IGNCNTR-R
_sub_fields.name: Ignition Counter (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 点火计数器（近期）

_sub_fields.label: IGNCNTR-L
_sub_fields.name: Ignition Counter (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 点火计数器（终身）

_sub_fields.label: FEOCNTR-R
_sub_fields.name: Fueled Engine Operation Ignition Cycle Counter (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 燃油发动机运行点火循环计数器（近期）

_sub_fields.label: FEOCNTR-L
_sub_fields.name: Fueled Engine Operation Ignition Cycle Counter (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 燃油发动机运行点火循环计数器（终身）

_sub_fields.label: ERT-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Engine Run Time (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机总运行时间（近期）

_sub_fields.label: ERT-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Engine Run Time (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机总运行时间（终身）

_sub_fields.label: IERT-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Idle Engine Run Time (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机怠速总运行时间（近期）

_sub_fields.label: IERT-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Idle Engine Run Time (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机怠速总运行时间（终身）

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - Distance/Fuel Used
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 距离/燃油消耗
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 fields × 4 bytes. Distance (0.1 km/bit), Fuel (0.01 L/bit).
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个字段×4字节。距离（0.1 km/位），燃油（0.01 L/位）。

_sub_fields.label: DT-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Distance Traveled (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 总行驶距离（近期）

_sub_fields.label: DT-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Distance Traveled (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 总行驶距离（终身）

_sub_fields.label: FC-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Fuel Consumed (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 总燃油消耗（近期）

_sub_fields.label: FC-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Fuel Consumed (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 总燃油消耗（终身）

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - PKE/EOE
info_types.description: 16 bytes (not 12): 4 fields × 4 bytes. PKE (1 km/hr²/bit), EOE (0.1 kWh/bit).
info_types.description_zh: 16字节（非12）：4个字段×4字节。PKE（1 km/hr²/位），EOE（0.1 kWh/位）。

_sub_fields.label: PKE-R
_sub_fields.name: Positive Kinetic Energy (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 正动能（近期）
_sub_fields.note: Fixed: removed erroneous *2 from original JSON

_sub_fields.label: PKE-L
_sub_fields.name: Positive Kinetic Energy (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 正动能（终身）

_sub_fields.label: EOE-R
_sub_fields.name: Engine Output Energy (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机输出能量（近期）

_sub_fields.label: EOE-L
_sub_fields.name: Engine Output Energy (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 发动机输出能量（终身）

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - PSA
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 推进系统活动

_sub_fields.label: PSA-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Propulsion System Active Time (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 推进系统活动总时间（近期）

_sub_fields.label: PSA-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Propulsion System Active Time (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 推进系统活动总时间（终身）

_sub_fields.label: IPSA-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Idle Propulsion System Active Time (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 怠速推进系统活动总时间（近期）

_sub_fields.label: IPSA-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Idle Propulsion System Active Time (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 怠速推进系统活动总时间（终身）

_sub_fields.label: CPSA-R
_sub_fields.name: Total City Propulsion System Active Time (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 城市推进系统活动总时间（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CPSA-L
_sub_fields.name: Total City Propulsion System Active Time (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 城市推进系统活动总时间（终身）

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Distance Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混动车辆距离数据
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个字段×4字节。均为0.1 km/位。

_sub_fields.label: CDEODT-R
_sub_fields.name: Charge Depleting Engine Off Distance (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗发动机关闭距离（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CDEODT-L
_sub_fields.name: Charge Depleting Engine Off Distance (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗发动机关闭距离（终身）

_sub_fields.label: CDERDT-R
_sub_fields.name: Charge Depleting Engine Running Distance (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗发动机运行距离（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CDERDT-L
_sub_fields.name: Charge Depleting Engine Running Distance (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗发动机运行距离（终身）

_sub_fields.label: CIDT-R
_sub_fields.name: Driver-Selectable Charge Increasing Distance (Recent)

_sub_fields.label: CIDT-L
_sub_fields.name: Driver-Selectable Charge Increasing Distance (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 驾驶员可选充电增加距离（终身）

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Fuel Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混动车辆燃油数据
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个字段×4字节。均为0.01 L/位。

_sub_fields.label: CDFC-R
_sub_fields.name: Fuel Consumed in Charge Depleting (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗中燃油消耗（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CDFC-L

_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电消耗中燃油消耗（终身）

_sub_fields.label: CIFC-R
_sub_fields.name: Fuel Consumed in Charge Increasing (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电增加中燃油消耗（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CIFC-L
_sub_fields.name: Fuel Consumed in Charge Increasing (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 充电增加中燃油消耗（终身）

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Grid Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混动车辆电网数据
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个字段×4字节。均为0.1 kWh/位。

_sub_fields.label: CDEOGE-R
_sub_fields.name: Grid Energy in CD Engine Off (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: CD发动机关闭电网能量（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CDEOGE-L
_sub_fields.name: Grid Energy in CD Engine Off (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: CD发动机关闭电网能量（终身）

_sub_fields.label: CDERGE-R
_sub_fields.name: Grid Energy in CD Engine Running (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: CD发动机运行电网能量（近期）

_sub_fields.label: CDERGE-L
_sub_fields.name: Grid Energy in CD Engine Running (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: CD发动机运行电网能量（终身）

_sub_fields.label: GE-R
_sub_fields.name: Total Grid Energy into Battery (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 电网能量充入电池总量（近期）

_sub_fields.label: GE-L
_sub_fields.name: Total Grid Energy into Battery (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 电网能量充入电池总量（终身）

info_types.name: Active Aerodynamic Features #1 Off-cycle Credit
info_types.name_zh: 主动空气动力学特性#1非循环积分
info_types.description: 32 bytes: 8 fields × 4 bytes. Active Grille Shutters A/B, Timer 1/2, Recent/Lifetime. 1 s/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 32字节：8个字段×4字节。主动格栅百叶窗A/B，计时器1/2，近期/终身。1秒/位。

_sub_fields.label: AGSB_TIME2-R
_sub_fields.name: Active Grille Shutter B Timer 2 (Recent)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 主动格栅B计时器2（近期）

_sub_fields.label: AGSB_TIME1-L
_sub_fields.name: Active Grille Shutter B Timer 1 (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 主动格栅B计时器1（终身）

_sub_fields.label: AGSB_TIME2-L
_sub_fields.name: Active Grille Shutter B Timer 2 (Lifetime)
_sub_fields.name_zh: 主动格栅B计时器2（终身）

info_types.name: Active Aerodynamic Features #2 Off-cycle Credit
info_types.name_zh: 主动空气动力学特性#2非循环积分
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 fields × 4 bytes. Vehicle Ride Height Control. 1 s/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个字段×4字节。车辆行驶高度控制。1秒/位。

_sub_fields.label: VRHC_TIME1-R
